rulings.Case Title: VICTOR GOMEZ VS. C.C. MOORE & CO. ENGINEERS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Sign Medical Record Authorizations
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, February 13, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1, Defendant Tosco Corp.¿s motion to compel plaintiff to sign medical record authorizations: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30am, not 9:00am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: GLENDA WALLS et al VS. CERTAINTEED CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Bryan Steam, Llc To Produce Custodian(S) Of Records And Person(S) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And Responsive Documents; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, February 13, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2, Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant Bryan Steam, LLC to produce custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and responsive documents: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30am, not 9:00am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)
